entries.title: Arrival.Space Plugins
entries.summary: Repository overview with quick start guidance, documentation links, supported property types, and the example plugin catalog.

entries.title: Agent Quickstart
entries.summary: High-signal checklist for generating Arrival.Space plugins, including shape, cleanup, property authoring, and example selection.

entries.title: API Reference
entries.summary: Reference for ArrivalScript lifecycle, ArrivalSpace helpers, model loading, UI, audio, physics, animation, avatars, and plugin management.

entries.title: Getting Started
entries.summary: Step-by-step introduction to creating a first plugin, adding properties, using the API, and understanding lifecycle hooks.

entries.title: Multiplayer API
entries.summary: Guide to synchronized state and messaging with attribute() and ArrivalSpace.net for real-time multiplayer plugins.

entries.title: Properties
entries.summary: Explains supported property types, static property schema, dynamic options, vec3 fields, and runtime updates in the editor UI.

entries.title: Annotation Marker
entries.summary: 3D marker with an icon and markdown popup content rendered as an in-world panel.

entries.title: Avatar Animation
entries.summary: Overrides player idle, walk, and jump animations using custom GLBs and demonstrates animation speed control.

entries.title: Bouncy Box
entries.summary: Simple rotating and bouncing debug box used as a minimal behavior example.

entries.title: Box Stack
entries.summary: Builds a physics pyramid of boxes and spheres, showing rigidbody setup and tunable visual parameters.

entries.title: Character Scale
entries.summary: Adjusts the controlled character's scale and movement feel with an in-world draggable slider UI.

entries.title: Dynamic Light
entries.summary: Reusable cone or point light controller with configurable light properties and optional helper visuals.

entries.title: Game HUD
entries.summary: Cinematic game-style HUD overlay that demonstrates app UI visibility, HTML overlays, and player-aware interface state.

entries.title: GLB Model
entries.summary: Loads and attaches an external GLB model as a child of the plugin entity.

entries.title: Hello World
entries.summary: Smallest possible Arrival.Space plugin showing the basic script shape and lifecycle entry point.

entries.title: Hover Board
entries.summary: Rideable hover board with avatar animation hooks, player input handling, standing-object logic, and dynamic physics.

entries.title: Dynamic Iframe UI
entries.summary: Dynamic world-space information panel built with createHTMLPanel and iframe or CSS-driven content.

entries.title: NPC Character
entries.summary: Spawns an NPC and makes it follow the local player, demonstrating createNPC and avatar setup.

entries.title: Outfit Override
entries.summary: Temporarily overrides the player's avatar outfit parts and shows how to restore them on cleanup.

entries.title: Physics Box
entries.summary: Basic rigidbody and collision example for a simple physics-enabled object.

entries.title: PostProcessVolume
entries.summary: Local post-effects blend volume that smoothly overrides room post-processing as the player moves through space.

entries.title: Simple Chat
entries.summary: Multiplayer chat example using ArrivalSpace.net messages plus synced values for lightweight shared UI state.

entries.title: Snowfall Particle Plugin
entries.summary: Configurable snowfall effect built with the PlayCanvas particle system, tunable curves, wind, and custom texture support.

entries.title: Procedural Splats - Snow
entries.summary: Flattened GSplat snow cover that raycasts onto collision surfaces and builds soft packed snow clumps instead of round blobs.

entries.title: Sound Trigger
entries.summary: Plays a sound when the player gets close to the object, demonstrating proximity-based audio behavior.

entries.title: Procedural Splats - Fire
entries.summary: Animated GSplat fire effect with flame, smoke, and sparks driven by CPU-updated splat data.

entries.title: Procedural Splats - Fog
entries.summary: Box-shaped volumetric fog volume built from a uniform GSplat lattice with editable size, alpha, and overlap.

entries.title: Procedural Splats - Grass
entries.summary: Dense procedural grass field made from anisotropic GSplats, with blade height, width, lean, and spawn control.

entries.title: Vehicle Physics Model
entries.summary: Driveable Ammo.js vehicle with custom chassis and wheel GLBs, suspension, headlights, and desktop/mobile mount controls.

entries.title: TypeScript Definitions
entries.summary: Type definitions for Arrival.Space plugin development, including ArrivalScript, ArrivalSpace, and commonly used PlayCanvas types.
